title: Safety of Immune-Targeted Therapy in Patients with Hepatocellular Carcinoma in the Real-World.
abstract: Combining immunotherapy with targeted therapy represents a promising trajectory for cancer treatment; however, safety profiles remain insufficient. This study aimed to characterize adverse events associated with immune-targeted regimens in hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC).
trial_name: Lenvatinib plus Pembrolizumab or Everolimus for Advanced Renal Cell Carcinoma
